title: Playerger
description: Gives players the distinctive noses and foreheads of this world's other denizens.
body:
### [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required!

Gives players the same dangling schonz and towering dome as villagers, pillagers, ravagers, and whatever othergers you may think of! Works with skin layers and armor.

BE WARNED: The nose derives its color from your skin! As a result, some skins work better than others!
